SiteMeta.description: A medical, comprehensive, and personalized approach to every stage of physical, mental, and emotional recovery.

SiteFooter.footerHeading: Excellence in Rehabilitation: The most comprehensive mental health treatment clinic for your recovery.

LobbyPage.pageHeaderDescription: A medical, comprehensive, and personalized approach to every stage of physical, mental, and emotional recovery.
LobbyPage.aboutUs: We understand that every recovery process is as unique as the story of the person experiencing it. That's why our clinic combines science, technology, and human care to provide truly comprehensive treatment. Through individual and group therapy, specialized psychiatric care, and continuous support, we help reduce withdrawal symptoms, prevent relapses, and strengthen emotional stability.
LobbyPage.whatWeTreatHeading: The journey to your recovery begins at Gabriel Arcángel.
LobbyPage.whatWeTreatDescription: We understand that the burden of addiction is carried not only by the individual, but also by those who stand by them day after day. Regardless of the journey that brought you here, we are ready to ensure you no longer fight this battle alone. With decades of experience serving high-profile clients, we provide an environment of utmost privacy and exclusivity, where your loved one will receive the clinical excellence and compassionate care they deserve.
LobbyPage.whatWeTreatImageAlt: CEO of the clinic giving a speech to relatives of the patients
LobbyPage.whatWeTreatItem1Description: We specialize in providing a deeply human and personalized guidance for mental health management. Our protocols intervene at the very root of your suffering, healing everything from the cellular and biological architecture to the psychological and neurochemical dimensions. We view recovery as a process of transformation, and our commitment is to lead your journey with precision and warmth at every stage.
LobbyPage.whatWeTreatItem2Description: Whether you are facing challenges with substance abuse, compulsive behaviors, or a dependence on prescription medications, at Gabriel Arcángel we offer a path toward definitive recovery. Our interdisciplinary model deconstructs the root causes of dependency—from deep emotional pain to chronic stress—equipping you with the internal architecture necessary for a life of balance, fulfillment, and absolute freedom.
LobbyPage.whatWeTreatItem3Description: At Gabriel Arcángel, we approach eating disorders with the clinical sophistication that their multifaceted nature demands. Our programs transcend dietary symptomatology, understanding that it is merely the visible manifestation of deeper imbalances. By intervening at the core of the condition—such as trauma, anxiety, or clinical perfectionism—we equip you with the tools to rebuild, in a comprehensive and definitive manner, your relationship with food and with yourself.
LobbyPage.howWeTreatHeading: A medical, comprehensive, and personalized approach to every stage of physical, mental, and emotional recovery.
LobbyPage.howWeTreatDescription:
At Gabriel Arcángel, we believe that a generalized approach hinders true recovery. We stand alone as the only treatment center in the world to provide a dedicated team of professionals for every single patient.
Throughout your stay, you will be supported by a private circle of world-renowned physicians, therapists, and specialists. By merging cutting-edge medical excellence with sophisticated holistic methodologies, we address the entire spectrum of your health. From cellular biology to psychological well-being, we craft a singular path to healing—ensuring that in the most exclusive environment, your recovery is our only focus.

OurProgrammesSection.ourProgrammesHeading: No patient is ever the same, so no treatment plan is either.
OurProgrammesSection.ourProgrammesItem1Description: Wherever you stand on your journey, whatever challenges you may face, we are here for you. We provide the elite care you require within a secure and nurturing environment. A place where your privacy is sacred and your recovery is our only focus.
OurProgrammesSection.ourProgrammesItem2Description: You are supported by a private circle of experts dedicated exclusively to your recovery. From your personal psychiatrist and primary physician to your live-in therapist and client relations team, we provide unwavering 24/7 support.
OurProgrammesSection.ourProgrammesItem3Description: Our treatment experience is entirely private and discreet, designed not only to prioritize your health but to safeguard your personal integrity at every stage of the process.

OurTeamSection.ourTeamHeading: World-class experts guiding you through every stage of your recovery
OurTeamSection.ourTeamDescription: Each patient is supported by a dedicated team of specialized physicians and therapists. Furthermore, with a medical advisory board composed of world-renowned professionals, you can be assured of unparalleled medical and therapeutic excellence.

AboutUsPage.metadataTitle: About Gabriel Arcángel - Impatient Addiction treatment
AboutUsPage.metadataDescription: Founded in 2015 in Querétaro by the Salazar family, Gabriel Arcángel pioneered the 'one-client-at-a-time' approach and a 360° integrated treatment model for mental health and addiction.
AboutUsPage.pageHeaderHeading:
The first step at
Gabriel Arcángel
is the last one
you’ll take alone.
AboutUsPage.whoWeAreHeading: We understand unequivocally that pain is universal, but recovery has to be personal.
AboutUsPage.whoWeAreDescription:
Founded in 2015 in Querétaro by the Salazar family, Gabriel Arcángel pioneered the 'one-client-at-a-time' approach and a 360° integrated treatment model for mental health and addiction.
We were also the first to incorporate functional medicine into this field, shaping a more holistic and effective way to support lasting recovery journeys. As the first center of its kind, we offer completely personalized and interdisciplinary treatment plans.
Our approach is truly unique because it is deeply tailored to the specific needs, history, and context of each individual.
AboutUsPage.whoWeTreatHeading: No matter who you are, we are here for you.
AboutUsPage.whoWeTreatDescription:
At our renowned, discreet, and highly specialized inpatient treatment center, we have had the privilege of treating thousands of individuals from all walks of life, regardless of their social standing, condition, age, gender, background, or beliefs.
We treat only one person at a time. Therefore, no matter how you live, what you have been through, who you are, or where you want to go in life, treatment at Gabriel Arcángel will help you see clearly not only how far you have come but also discover with confidence the path that lies ahead.
AboutUsPage.ourApproachDescription:
We are the only inpatient addiction treatment center in Querétaro that integrates mental health professionals with cutting-edge technology. Throughout your stay, you will be accompanied by a coordinated team of certified doctors, therapists, and specialists, all working together to deliver the highest standard of care.
To ensure truly advanced and effective treatment, we have assembled a leading team of medical experts and therapists who work one-on-one with each patient. Our therapeutic approach incorporates the latest scientific breakthroughs, such as Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) and IV Nutrient Therapy, facilitating effective detoxification and recovery.
You will have a 24/7 support team and specialists available whenever you need them, regardless of the day or hour. Every detail has been designed to guarantee absolute discretion, maximum comfort, and constant guidance throughout your recovery journey.
AboutUsPage.faqItem1Title: Who is the founder of Gabriel Arcángel?
AboutUsPage.faqItem1Description: Together with his family, César Salazar founded Gabriel Arcángel in 2016.
AboutUsPage.faqItem2Title: Who is the CEO of Gabriel Arcángel?
AboutUsPage.faqItem2Description: César Salazar remains CEO and Founder. He has an extensive background in the mental health services industry, having served as a consultant and manager at various mental health institutions prior to founding Gabriel Arcángel.
AboutUsPage.faqItem3Title: How does the one client at a time model work?
AboutUsPage.faqItem3Description: Our one patient at a time philosophy ensures an uncompromising level of dedication. During your stay, our entire interdisciplinary team—from specialized physicians and therapists to nutritionists—is focused exclusively on your recovery. By dedicating several hours of intensive, one-on-one interaction daily, we cultivate a sanctuary of safety and understanding. This immersive approach allows us to achieve in a single month what traditional clinical settings often take years to accomplish.
AboutUsPage.faqItem4Title: How does Gabriel Arcángel redefine the clinical experience?
AboutUsPage.faqItem4Description: What sets us apart is the profound depth of care and the uncompromising personal attention we provide. Our philosophy seamlessly integrates medical precision with holistic, evidence-based therapies. Every aspect of your journey is meticulously tailored to you, within an environment defined by absolute privacy, nurturing support, and discretion.
AboutUsPage.faqItem5Title: Where are Gabriel Arcángel’s headquarters located?
AboutUsPage.faqItem5Description: Our headquarters are located in Queretaro, Mexico.
AboutUsPage.faqItem6Title: What types of conditions does Gabriel Arcángel treat?
AboutUsPage.faqItem6Description: We treat addiction, burnout, depression, anxiety, trauma, and other mental health challenges through a comprehensive blend of tailored, evidence-based therapies. We utilize advanced technology, such as Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS), for the treatment of neuropsychiatric and neurological disorders.
AboutUsPage.faqItem7Title: What sets Gabriel Arcángel’s treatment approach apart?
AboutUsPage.faqItem7Description:
What sets Gabriel Arcángel apart is our one-patient-at-a-time model, combined with unparalleled medical excellence. Every patient receives a fully personalized treatment plan, designed and overseen by a dedicated team of doctors, psychiatrists, therapists, and specialists.
We integrate cutting-edge medical science and technology with evidence-based psychotherapies, holistic therapies, and lifestyle interventions, addressing not only the symptoms but the root causes of addiction, trauma, stress, and mental health challenges. Our approach combines precision, compassion, and depth, ensuring that each patient receives the full focus of our team.
By merging medical rigor, state-of-the-art technology, innovative therapies, and an environment of privacy and care, we create a space where patients can heal, grow, and achieve lasting recovery in a truly exceptional way.
AboutUsPage.faqItem8Title: How can I contact Gabriel Arcángel?
AboutUsPage.faqItem8Description: You can reach us through the contact section of our website, where you will find options for phone calls, WhatsApp, and email, or you may use our online inquiry form.
AboutUsPage.faqFooterHeading: Need more help? We’re here for you.
AboutUsPage.faqFooterDescription: There are no silly or unnecessary questions when it comes to figuring out if our treatment programmes are the right fit for you. So, if you have questions that are not covered here, please reach out. Our client relations team are available 24/7 for a confidential, obligation-free conversation.

ApproachPage.metadataDescription: Our 360-degree approach unites world-class specialists under a single purpose: your evolution. From medical precision to constant emotional support, we cover every angle of your well-being with absolute rigor and discretion.
ApproachPage.headerHeadingPage: The most comprehensive, innovative and cutting-edge treatment.
ApproachPage.videoDescription: Our 360-degree approach unites world-class specialists under a single purpose: your evolution. From medical precision to constant emotional support, we cover every angle of your well-being with absolute rigor and discretion.
ApproachPage.methodDescription: We understand health as the reflection of our inner bond. At Gabriel Arcángel, we move beyond standardized solutions to design bespoke programs that respond to each individual's uniqueness. We integrate next-generation medicine and a holistic approach under the supervision of international experts, ensuring absolute support throughout your entire restoration process.
ApproachPage.assessmentsHeading: A 360-degree treatment that considers the whole person: mind, body, and soul.
ApproachPage.assessmentsDescription: Gabriel Arcángel established itself as the pioneering center in Querétaro by integrating functional medicine and cutting-edge interdisciplinary protocols. Since our inception, we have understood that symptoms are the echo of deep imbalances in life. True healing requires deciphering the origin and purpose of these signs; only then can we treat the root cause, moving beyond the superficial relief of symptoms.
ApproachPage.programmesHeading: Our path to healing, tailored entirely to you.
ApproachPage.programmesDescription: Each treatment program is a piece of clinical architecture, meticulously designed to respond to the uniqueness of every client. We approach health from both its physical complexity and psychological depth; should our evaluation detect biochemical or emotional imbalances, the program is immediately reconfigured to integrate them. Our pragmatic vision understands your lifestyle: from corporate demands to international commitments, we adapt with absolute flexibility to your requirements.
ApproachPage.techDescription:
Nuestro equipo está integrado por líderes que han consolidado el presente y continúan trazando el futuro de sus respectivas disciplinas a nivel mundial.
Su programa es una pieza de alta ingeniería clínica, diseñada por especialistas de renombre internacional. Nos guía la medicina de vanguardia: desde resonancias magnéticas de cuerpo completo y protocolos avanzados de laboratorio, hasta psicoterapia con psicodélicos e infusiones vitamínicas de precisión. Integramos cada recurso diagnóstico y terapéutico de última generación para asegurar una restauración absoluta.
ApproachPage.therapieHeading: We meet you wherever you are
ApproachPage.therapieDescription:
With over a decade of experience, we have accompanied the restoration of health in its most complex forms. We understand that, all too often, the journey leads us to feel isolated or bound to habits that compromise our fulfillment, creating an emotional burden that is difficult to sustain. At Gabriel Arcángel, our priority is your personal evolution—whether collaborating with your trusted team or providing exclusive care, through extended periods or strategic sessions. We facilitate a seamless transition toward your own healing.
We recognize that success is deeply individual: in the management of dependencies, it may translate into absolute freedom or a conscious balance; in mental health, it may mean overcoming the symptom or learning to transform that energy into a tool that works in your favor.
Under a guarantee of unwavering confidentiality, we customize every aspect of your stay. Regardless of your definition of progress, we are here to ensure you achieve it.
ApproachPage.residenceDescription:
Health and well-being are intrinsic pillars of our philosophy; the natural result of a secure environment, a profound connection with nature, and uncompromising medical excellence.
Our headquarters are located in Querétaro, an enclave that blends Mexico's clinical vanguard with an atmosphere of unique serenity. Here, the convergence of high-precision medicine, elite hospital infrastructure, and a peaceful environment transforms the city into an unparalleled setting for personal evolution, mental clarity, and the beginning of a restored life.
ApproachPage.ourTeamDescription: We are the only treatment center in Querétaro to assign a dedicated team of professionals to each client. Therefore, throughout your stay, you will be guided by a team of specialized physicians, therapists, and experts.

AssessmentsPage.pagePhrase: Creating change on a cellular level
AssessmentsPage.pageDescription: We can only tailor a programme to a client when we know where the problems lie. Using our 360-interdisciplinary approach, our assessment procedure identifies each possible area of your health and well-being that requires re-balancing. The process forms the bedrock of your treatment programme.
AssessmentsPage.specialisedLaboratoryTestsDescription:
Physical symptoms significantly impact your mental health and overall well-being. Symptoms such as high blood pressure, weight issues, fatigue, chronic or acute pain, autoimmune diseases, diabetes, brain fog, digestive issues, muscle weakness, headaches, or skin problems almost always indicate internal inflammation and imbalances.
To uncover the root causes, we conduct blood tests to examine your haematology, liver function, glycemia, blood lipids, and thyroid activity. We also assess your gut biology and examine your stress hormone, mineral, vitamin levels, and oxidative stress levels. Advanced diagnostics such as 24-hour ECGs, stress MRIs, and mitochondrial function tests are used to assess cardiovascular and respiratory health.
AssessmentsPage.geneticTestingDescription:
Genetic testing lies at the heart of our tailored approach to your health. Through these tests, we can identify changes and variations in your DNA (genes, chromosomes, or proteins) through a tissue sample (typically saliva). These tests enable us to identify potential health risks, locate genetic or inherited disorders, and screen for inherited neurochemical imbalances, cancer susceptibility, reproductive health, familial (mental and physical) health history and other vital parameters.
Tests include epigenetics, whole genome sequencing (WGS), biochemical, cytogenetic, and molecular assessments. Each test analyses different biomarkers to ensure a complete and comprehensive picture of your cellular health.
AssessmentsPage.stateOfTheArtImagingDiagnosticsDescripti:
We employ a range of cutting-edge machines, including MRI (Magnetic Resonance Imaging), CT (Computed Tomography) scanners, and PET (Positron Emission Tomography) scanners. These machines utilise advanced techniques to create detailed images of your body‘s internal structures and help us identify various conditions.
These can include (but are not limited to) cardiovascular diseases, respiratory conditions, gastrointestinal disorders, oncological conditions, and urological and gynaecological conditions. All of these conditions have a bearing on our emotional and psychological well-being.
AssessmentsPage.functionalHealthAssessmentsDescription:
Functional medicine targets the root cause of a disease rather than the symptoms, making it central to our assessment procedure. Our team will assess neurotransmitter imbalances, amino acid imbalances, hyper or hypo-glycaemia (elevated glucose or glucose deficiency), inflammatory stress and oxidative stress on the cellular level, adrenal fatigue, gut health (e.g. ulcers, gut microbiome, inflammatory parameters, food intolerances, parasites, etc.) and hormone levels.
Once we have the results of your tests, your functional medicine team will then analyse the relationship between your cellular, environmental, genetic, historical and lifestyle results to understand how these factors correlate to various disease and ill-health markers.
AssessmentsPage.sleepAssessmentDescription:
Sleep is the foundation of physical and mental well-being, playing a crucial role in immune function, hormone regulation, and emotional resilience. Chronic sleep deprivation can exacerbate conditions like anxiety, depression, and heart disease while also impairing cognitive functions such as memory and decision-making. Prioritising and addressing sleep-related issues is a priority for us, as it plays a foundational role in restoring your inner sense of balance and well-being.  
Sleep studies involve monitoring your brain waves, eye motions and heart rhythms during sleep. Your team will use these studies to determine if you suffer from issues such as insomnia, restless leg syndrome or sleep apnoea.
AssessmentsPage.psychiatricScreeningDescription:
Our in-house psychiatrist will conduct a personalised diagnostic procedure to identify mental health conditions affecting your quality of life and physical health. While this might sound cold and clinical, it simply means having a one-on-one conversation with our lead psychiatrist, who will help you figure out why you might be struggling in the way you are.
This comprehensive assessment includes evaluating emotional well-being, identifying stressors, analysing your history, childhood experiences, and whether or not there is any history of mental health issues in your family. We will also screen for conditions such as anxiety, depression, PTSD, or other underlying psychiatric disorders. Dual diagnosis is a critical part of this process, as it addresses the coexistence of mental health conditions and substance use disorders, ensuring that both can be treated during your time with us. To improve the accuracy of your psychiatric diagnosis, we take a precision psychiatry approach, which involves integrating genomics, neuroimaging, biomarker analysis, and artificial intelligence into the diagnostic process.
AssessmentsPage.lifestyleAndNutritionalAssessmentDescrip: Our dietitians, medical doctors and nutritional scientists will examine your dietary habits, nutrient deficiencies, metabolic health, stress levels, physical activity levels, caffeine, alcohol, and nicotine intake (when applicable), self-reported loneliness and connection levels, and overall lifestyle habits. We will then analyse your results in conjunction with your tests to ensure a complete and comprehensive picture of your health.
AssessmentsPage.psychologicalAssessmentDescription:
Our psychological assessment focuses on understanding the deeper emotional and cognitive patterns influencing your overall well-being. This assessment procedure is very different to the psychiatric diagnosis, as it emphasises the experiential, unconscious aspects of your ill health. In dialogue with one of our in-house psychologists, you will explore some of the thoughts, emotions, and behaviours accompanying your distress and imbalances.
This assessment is designed to identify psychological challenges, offering insights into how past experiences, current stressors, or unhelpful thought patterns may affect your mental and physical health. Unlike psychiatric screening, which diagnoses specific conditions, psychological assessments help guide the therapeutic interventions we will incorporate into your programme. These can include evidence-based approaches like cognitive-behavioural therapy, mindfulness practices and psychodynamic psychotherapy.
AssessmentsPage.additionalAssessmentsDescription: We tailor every aspect of your programme to your needs, including the assessment procedure. So, if we’ve conducted all of the above and we think there is still more to uncover, we will conduct more tests. The list of these tests can be pretty endless, ranging from dermatological, gynaecological, dental health checks, cancer screenings, endoscopies, and respiratory function assessments to personality inventories (e.g. MMPI, Big Five), anxiety and depression scales, substance use evaluations, audiological assessments, and many more.
AssessmentsPage.ourApproachHeading: Focused on one thing: Your path to healing
AssessmentsPage.ourApproachDescription:
At the heart of our process is the 360-degree approach, a groundbreaking method we pioneered to deliver truly holistic care. By integrating advanced medical diagnostics with therapeutic and lifestyle interventions, we go beyond mere symptom management to address root causes. In doing so, we can focus on creating true change in our lives, starting on a cellular level.
It is important to emphasise that the list above is not exhaustive. Every medical assessment begins with a conversation about your symptoms, allowing us to tailor the procedure to your needs. If you can share your medical history, it will be invaluable in personalising your assessment.

TechPage.pagePhrase: Pushing the boundaries of clinical excellence
TechPage.pageDescription:
At Gabriel Arcángel, we use the most advanced, state-of-the-art medical technologies to ensure unparalleled assessment, diagnostics and treatment precision.  From 24-hour ECGs, IV infusions, and HRV testing to stress MRIs and Intermittent Hyperoxic Hypoxic treatment, our suite of tools represents the forefront of medical innovation.
Not all of these technologies are suitable for every client. Some are used by default, while others, especially more invasive diagnostic tools, are only employed when indicated and always with the client’s consent.
TechPage.3dEcgDescription: Unlike traditional ECGs offering a two-dimensional snapshot, the 3D ECG captures a more detailed and comprehensive picture of heart function. This precision allows us to detect irregularities such as arrhythmias, ischaemia, or structural abnormalities that might otherwise go unnoticed. A healthy heart is crucial for both optimal physical well-being and emotional regulation.
TechPage.24hEngDescription: Unlike a standard ECG, which offers a brief snapshot, this test provides a complete picture of how your heart performs during various activities, rest periods, and sleep. By understanding the interaction between stress, activity, and heart function, this test helps us understand what physical health issues you are struggling with, which we will then address in your treatment programme.
TechPage.HrvAndCarotidUltrasoundDescription:
Heart Rate Variability (HRV) measures the variation in time between heartbeats, offering insights into your autonomic nervous system’s balance and stress levels. Conversely, carotid ultrasound evaluates the health of your carotid arteries, which supply blood to the brain, detecting plaque build-up or narrowing that could lead to strokes.
We use HRV testing & Carotid Ultrasounds to assess your body’s ability to recover from stress and maintain equilibrium. In doing so, we gain a comprehensive understanding of your cardiovascular health. Mental health issues take a great toll on our hearts and our ability to cope with stress. If we can amend these imbalances, it protects you against physical risks and promotes mental clarity and emotional stability.
TechPage.stressEchocardiographyDescription: Stress echocardiography combines ultrasound imaging of the heart with stress tests to assess how the heart functions under physical or emotional stress. This test detects heart conditions that may not be apparent during rest. We use stress echocardiography to identify cardiovascular risks linked to stress. By addressing these issues, we support heart health and mental well-being, helping you manage stress effectively and confidently.
TechPage.tmsDescription: Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation (TMS) is a noninvasive neurostimulation technique that uses rapidly changing magnetic fields to induce electrical currents in specific areas of the brain.  It does not require surgery, anesthesia, or electrode implantation, making it an outpatient procedure typically performed in clinics.
TechPage.sleepizDescription: Without adequate sleep, our physical and mental health will plummet. Sleepiz is a non-invasive device that monitors sleep patterns and detects issues like sleep apnoea, snoring, and other disruptions. We use Sleepiz to diagnose and address sleep-related issues, enhancing restorative sleep. By improving your sleep quality, we can guarantee mental health benefits like a boost in energy, cognitive performance, and emotional resilience, on top of the countless physical health benefits that come with improved sleep.
TechPage.nadAndOrthomolecularIVInfusionsDescripti: NAD and Orthomolecular IV infusions deliver essential nutrients, vitamins, and coenzymes like NAD directly into the bloodstream. This therapy enhances cellular repair, reduces inflammation, and boosts energy production. At Paracelsus Recovery, we use these infusions to ensure to rejuvenate your body on a cellular level and ensure that your internal systems are in balance.
TechPage.whoopBandAndOuraRingDescription: The Whoop Band and Oura Ring are advanced wearable devices that track sleep, recovery, and activity levels, providing real-time data on your body’s performance and readiness. These devices offer insights into stress levels, recovery needs, and overall physical condition.
TechPage.neurofeedbackDescription: Neurofeedback is a cutting-edge therapy that trains your brain to regulate its own activity. By using real-time monitoring of brainwaves, neurofeedback helps improve mental function, emotional regulation, and cognitive performance. This non-invasive treatment can reduce symptoms of anxiety, depression, ADHD, and stress by retraining the brain to create more balanced and efficient neural patterns. It enhances focus, emotional stability, and overall mental clarity, contributing to both psychological well-being and improved quality of life.
TechPage.therapeuticMassageChairsDescription: Therapeutic massage chairs are designed to provide relief from chronic pain, improve circulation, and promote muscle recovery, making them ideal for home use or professional settings such as physiotherapy clinics. These chairs incorporate advanced technologies such as body detection sensors, 5D massage, therapeutic heat, and customized programs that mimic the techniques of a professional therapist.

PsychotherapyPage.sectionHeading: Psychotherapy: What is, What are the Different Types, and How id included
PsychotherapyPage.sectionDescription: At Gabriel Arcángel, we adopt an entirely holistic treatment model, with psychotherapy treatment playing an integral role The aim of psychotherapy is to provide you with the space and support needed to think through the questions you have about yourself and your suffering; both consciously and unconsciously.
PsychotherapyPage.whatIsDescription:
Our minds, like our bodies, are constantly attempting to heal. However, in order to do so, we must process and release painful emotions. When we feel trapped in destructive cycles of behaviour, our mind is attempting to bring unresolved feelings to the surface. Every time we are confronted with the same pain, our unconscious mind hopes that this time we will be able to process the pain and trauma. However, that is a significant task to undertake on your own. That is where psychotherapy comes in.
Psychotherapy is an approach to treating mental health conditions that involves talking with a trained psychotherapist. It is also referred to as talk therapy, counselling or just ‘therapy’. A psychotherapist can assist you in processing unresolved emotions and understanding how or why those emotions came to be. Working together, your psychotherapist will help you navigate challenges, develop healthy coping strategies and accept those parts of yourself that you’ve been at war with.
Among the numerous benefits of psychotherapy are: coping strategies to manage distress, improved communication skills, greater awareness of negative thoughts and greater insights about your life. In many ways, psychotherapy invites you to try and think about who you are and how you came to be ‘you.’ That knowledge enables us to accept ourselves as we are, which in turn, gives us the opportunity to choose to live our lives on our own terms.
PsychotherapyPage.typesHeading: What are the different types of psychotherapy?
PsychotherapyPage.typesDescription: There are many different types of psychotherapy, and your specific psychotherapists will tailor the treatment to your specific needs. Some common types include:
PsychotherapyPage.itpDescription: Concentrates on improving interpersonal relationships and communication skills.
PsychotherapyPage.cbtDescription: Focuses on identifying and changing negative thought patterns and behaviours.
PsychotherapyPage.psychodynamicDescription: Explores the unconscious processes and past experiences that influence current behaviour.
PsychotherapyPage.hypnotherapyDescription: Utilises deep relaxation to access the unconscious mind, helping to uncover and address underlying emotional triggers, break negative behavioural patterns, and promote healing at a subconscious level.
PsychotherapyPage.psychoanalysisDescription: A deeper form of psychodynamic therapy, psychoanalysis delves into the unconscious mind to explore repressed thoughts and feelings, often through free association and dream analysis.
PsychotherapyPage.humanisticDescription: Emphasises self-exploration and personal growth, fostering self-acceptance and self-awareness.
PsychotherapyPage.dbtDescription: Primarily used for emotion regulation and interpersonal effectiveness, often applied in cases of borderline personality disorder.
PsychotherapyPage.eftDescription: Aims to help individuals process and manage their emotions effectively.
PsychotherapyPage.typesFooter: Your psychotherapist will collaborate with you to determine the most appropriate approach, often combining techniques to create a personalised treatment plan that meets your unique needs.
PsychotherapyPage.ourProgrammeHeading: How is psychotherapy Included in my programme?
PsychotherapyPage.ourProgrammeDescription: You will work one-on-one in numerous sessions with a dedicated psychotherapist, typically one or two a day. They will assist you in overcoming any underlying trauma, negative thinking patterns or unresolved issues that may be contributing to your mental health issues or addiction. In addition to the psychotherapist, you will collaborate with a dedicated live-in therapist, psychologist and psychiatrist to ensure that you receive the most effective mental health treatment possible. Our team also includes qualified practitioners who use some of the world’s most cutting-edge treatment methods. These include, but are not limited to:
PsychotherapyPage.ourProgrammeItem2: Eye movement desensitisation and reprocessing (EMDR) therapy.
PsychotherapyPage.ourProgrammeFooter: Your psychotherapy treatment will begin with an in-depth interdisciplinary assessment. During this period, we will explore the presenting and underlying issues from all perspectives. Working collaboratively, we then create a specialised psychotherapeutic treatment program that addresses your unique set of needs. This plan will specify how frequently you will receive psychotherapy and consult with your psychiatrist. In some cases, psychotherapy can be effective in treating your condition without the need for medicines. However, you may also need medication to ease the symptoms of navigate the acute stage of mental health struggles.

LiveInTherapistPage.sectionHeading: Live-in Therapist: What is, How can help me, and What are the benefits
LiveInTherapistPage.sectionDescription: We believe that by providing empathy and support 24/7, you are given the best possible chance of long-term recovery.
LiveInTherapistPage.whatIsDescription:
A live-in therapist is at the heart of your strong treatment team. They are a trained psychotherapist or counsellor who stays in a self-contained room in your residence or in an adjacent room if you choose to stay in a hotel.
In most psychotherapy clinics, therapy sessions are for one hour a day at a designated time. We take a different approach. By providing each of our clients with a live-in therapist, we can provide highly bespoke impromptu support whenever you need it most.
LiveInTherapistPage.howHelpHeading: How does a live-in therapist help me?
LiveInTherapistPage.howHelpDescription:
All live-in therapists are highly experienced and qualified therapists. The role of the live-in therapist is to provide ongoing empathy, support and psychotherapeutic engagement throughout your stay with us. We believe that by using these characteristics as the foundation of our treatment model, we can give you a better chance of achieving long-term and positive change in your life. This is because the strength of the therapeutic bond, also known as the therapeutic alliance, is one of the main indicators of successful treatment. We provide the most comprehensive therapeutic alliance possible by making a therapist available 24 hours a day, seven days a week.
In addition to emotional support, the live-in therapist provides detailed feedback to the psychotherapeutic team on a regular basis. We do this to ensure that you feel supported throughout your stay and to allow us to tailor the treatment programme to your specific needs.
LiveInTherapistPage.benefistHeading: What are the benefits of a live-in therapist?
LiveInTherapistPage.benefistDescription:
Live-in therapy is a central element to our treatment programmes that enables us to actively use each of the 24 hours in a day towards a client’s recovery. This is born out of an understanding that many UHNW people cannot simply take a month away from work and slip away from life in the public eye. Therefore, live-in therapy is integral to getting clients on the road to recovery as quickly as possible so they can get back to living their lives.
Having access to a 24-hour live-in therapist means that therapy can happen as and when it is needed rather than having to wait for the designated therapy slot to come around. In fact, we find that a lot of the most effective therapy happens in the moments in between official therapy sessions.

PsychiatryPage.sectionHeading: Psychiatry: What is, Difference, and How are included
PsychiatryPage.sectionDescription: We adopt a completely holistic treatment model, with your personal psychiatrist playing a central role. Their goal is to alleviate your mental distress, provide you with a diagnosis (if necessary) and formulate your treatment plans.
PsychiatryPage.whatIsDescription:
Psychiatry is the branch of medicine concerned with diagnosing, treating and preventing mental health conditions. A psychiatrist has a deep understanding of brain chemistry and the brain-body connection, making them able to assess both the mental and physical aspects of psychological problems by performing or ordering a full range of medical laboratory and psychological tests.
At Paracelsus Recovery, our psychiatrists work on the basis of the biopsychosocial model of illness, which views health and disease as being influenced by a combination of biology, psychology and social factors. This approach recognises that mental health conditions and substance abuse disorders arise from multiple causes, necessitating a holistic treatment plan. Depending on your specific needs, treatment may include various types of talk therapy (psychotherapy), medication, psychosocial interventions and other treatments (such as EMDR (Eye Movement Desensitisation and Reprocessing).
Psychiatry is beneficial for treating a huge range of mental health conditions including:
PsychiatryPage.whatIsFooter: Psychiatrists can also provide support for people struggling with chronic health conditions or chronic pain.
PsychiatryPage.differenceHeading: What’s the difference between psychiatry and psychotherapy?
PsychiatryPage.differenceDescription:
It’s easy to confuse psychiatry and psychotherapy, but it’s important to recognise the significant distinctions between the two. Both fields aim to relieve mental distress and suffering, yet they employ different approaches.
Psychiatrists are medically trained doctors who can prescribe medication, while psychotherapists do not have this authority. Armed with a deep understanding of the interconnections between mental and physical health, psychiatrists are equipped to diagnose disorders, manage treatment plans, and provide therapies for complex and severe mental illnesses. In contrast, psychotherapists focus on non-medical interventions, emphasising social, cultural, and environmental factors through various forms of psychotherapy (talk therapy).
Our psychologists and psychiatrists collaborate closely as an integral part of your personalised treatment team, ensuring a tailored approach that meets your unique needs.
PsychiatryPage.programmeHeading: How is psychiatry included in my programme?
PsychiatryPage.programmeDescription:
As we do not adopt a one-size-fits-all treatment approach, exactly what psychiatry elements your treatment programme will include depends on your specific needs. No matter what you come to Gabriel Arcágel for, a senior psychiatrist will lead your treatment programme and work with the rest of your team to create your bespoke plan.
Working in conjunction with your psychotherapists, your psychiatrist will help you address the emotional issues, traumas and negative thoughts that are related to your suffering. To improve the accuracy of your psychiatric diagnosis and treatment, we take a precision psychiatry approach, which involves integrating genomics, neuroimaging, biomarker analysis, and artificial intelligence into the diagnostic process. Psychoeducation will provide you with more knowledge about your mental health condition by exploring the triggers of the illness and how to manage or eliminate the symptoms. If necessary, and with your agreement, your psychiatrist will also prescribe medication.
Unique to Switzerland, all our psychiatrists are not only experts in diagnostics and treatment prescriptions, but also highly trained in psychotherapy. They are an essential part of the psychotherapeutic team, collaborating with psychologists and live-in therapists to offer a more holistic and comprehensive approach to your recovery.

Treatment.itDescription: A specialized residential program for overcoming addiction. We provide professional guidance, 24/7 supervision, and a supportive environment designed to eliminate risks and empower patients through every stage of their recovery.
Treatment.otDescription: Our outpatient program offers intensive treatment sessions tailored to your schedule, providing the necessary support to strengthen your sobriety while maintaining your daily routines and personal connections.
Treatment.edpDescription: The immediate solution to interrupt substance use and regain control. A strategic and medically supervised first step that prepares you for success in ongoing treatment, without the need for prolonged absences from your professional or family life.
Treatment.tmsDescription: Non-Invasive and Painless Neurostimulation. Regulate your brain activity safely and naturally. This technique uses magnetic technology to strengthen areas of the brain affected by substance use, reducing anxiety and facilitating the rehabilitation process without systemic side effects.
Treatment.cipDescription: We identify the real challenges behind the addiction. Our diagnostic process evaluates your emotional and physical health holistically, allowing us to create a tailored action plan that addresses not only the dependency but also your mental well-being and long-term stability.
Treatment.rppDescription: Learn to recognize and master the situations that put your recovery at risk. We work with you to detect high-risk emotions or environments and create effective responses to prevent relapse. Leave our facility with a clear action plan and the skills necessary to protect your well-being every single day.

ConditionsWeTreatPage.metadataDescription: However you live, and whatever you’ve lived through, this is your place for healing.

ConditionsWeTreatPage.descriptionPage:
At Gabriel Arcángel, we have established a sanctuary of absolute discretion for those facing complex challenges in their physical and mental health. We understand that these hurdles are not isolated events, but rather the confluence of interrelated factors—ranging from burnout and anxiety to biochemical imbalances and systemic disruptions derived from lifestyle.
Based on the premise that health is an ecosystem where the biological, psychological, and emotional converge, our commitment to medical excellence allows us to decipher and treat the root cause. We do not limit ourselves to the palliative management of symptoms; our methodology is designed to eradicate them at their source, thereby restoring the fulfillment and performance of our patients.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.mentalHealthArticleDescription: While every mental health narrative i|s unique, there remains a universal constant: isolation. Emotional imbalances fragment us, especially when a diagnosis is mistaken for identity, fueling the false premise of personal weakness. The reality is that mental health, much like physical health, is a universal human vulnerability. At Gabriel Arcángel, we address the neurobiological and psychological pain born from this alienation. Our team accompanies you in processing that suffering and transcending your challenges to restore your personal integrity.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.dependenciesAndAddictionsArticleDescript: Few states are as devastating as the moment one recognizes the loss of control in the face of dependency. Addictions operate as survival mechanisms against trauma, chronic stress, or emotional void, until the refuge itself transforms into the primary source of anguish. Whether dealing with substances, compulsive behaviors, or prescription medications, our intervention allows you to reclaim your personal sovereignty. We help you dismantle the cycle of fear and stigma to build an existence grounded in freedom and autonomy.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.eatingDisorderArticleDescription: Eating disorders often colonize one’s identity long before there is an awareness of their presence. They are complex manifestations of psychological and systemic roots that transcend mere nutrition. At Gabriel Arcángel, we equip you with the tools to dissolve the fear of losing control. Through an elite multidisciplinary approach, we intervene in the underlying mechanisms dictating your relationship with food—such as trauma, anxiety, or the rigidity of perfectionism—to restore peace and bodily balance.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachHeading: Our approach considers the whole person: mind, body, and soul.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachDescription: Gabriel Arcángel is a vanguard institution designed for those facing—or choosing to prevent—complex challenges in their physical, mental, or emotional health. We conceive wellness as a continuous evolution; therefore, we are the only center globally to deploy an ecosystem of dedicated specialists for every individual. This medical architecture allows us to chart a path toward integral restoration with an unprecedented level of personalization.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachItem1Title: By your side, exactly where you are.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachItem1Description: No matter where you are in your journey, or who you are, we are here to accompany you. With an unbreakable commitment to discretion, we provide the care you need in a world-class environment of maximum security and support.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachItem2Title: Guiding you on your personal evolution.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachItem2Description: Recovery is a profoundly intimate journey, and our approach is entirely personalized. There are no quick fixes; transformation requires commitment and determination. However, you will not traverse this path alone. We are by your side, guiding and supporting you at every step of the process.
ConditionsWeTreatPage.treatmentApproachItem3Description: With a team of specialists per patient, state-of-the-art facilities, and certified medical treatments, we ensure access to the most advanced diagnostic tools and therapeutic protocols in the world for your recovery.

ConditionPage.contactHeading:
Need help?
We’re here for you.
ConditionPage.contactDescription: Change starts with a conversation, so please do not hesitate to reach out if you think we could help you or a loved one. Our client-relation team are available around the clock for a confidential call about your health.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem1Description: We can only design a program tailored to you once we understand the deep-seated origin of your pain. Through our 360-degree interdisciplinary approach, your team of experts will identify every facet of your health and well-being that requires attention and rebalancing, thereby establishing the foundation of your personalized treatment.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem2Description: Mental health challenges are as deeply rooted in biology as they are in the psyche. Utilizing state-of-the-art diagnostic tools—including 24-hour ECG monitoring, Heart Rate Variability (HRV) testing, stress echocardiography, and full-body MRIs—we accurately identify any anomalies. Through the lens of functional medicine, we detect underlying imbalances such as chronic inflammation, gut dysfunction, heavy metal toxicity, or nutritional deficiencies that impact your well-being.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem3Description: You will participate in daily individual sessions with a dedicated psychotherapist specialized in trauma processing. This space will allow you to articulate and transform the patterns, wounds, and stressors that have conditioned your mental health. Our team will assist you in restructuring negative thought patterns, equipping you with sustainable mechanisms for symptom management. Furthermore, as our psychiatrists are proficient in various therapeutic modalities, your care will have an unparalleled clinical depth.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem4Description: Working in close collaboration with your therapists, your psychiatrist will oversee every aspect of your program. We adopt a precision psychiatry approach, designing protocols based on your unique genetic, biological, and psychological profile. Beyond diagnosis and personalized pharmacology, we work one-on-one to resolve co-occurring conditions and deep-seated traumas, ensuring a comprehensive recovery.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem5Description: Having a live-in therapist means that healing does not wait for a scheduled appointment. We understand that the most significant breakthroughs often occur in everyday moments or during times of acute vulnerability—whether over a mid-morning coffee or in the stillness of the early hours. We are present when the symptom emerges, not after.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem6Description: At Gabriel Arcángel, we are active advocates for innovation in mental health. When clinically indicated, we integrate Ketamine-Assisted Psychotherapy (KAP) protocols—a cutting-edge tool that can accelerate recovery and open new pathways toward healing in cases of traditional treatment resistance.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem7Description: This branch of functional medicine ensures that your body possesses all the neurochemical components necessary for optimal functioning. It is a critical pillar in addiction recovery; by correcting the biochemical imbalances caused by substance use, patients experience a drastic reduction in cravings and an immediate stabilization of mood.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem8Description: We integrate personalized physical modalities to facilitate holistic healing. From advanced physiotherapy, yoga, and Pilates to animal-assisted therapies (equine and canine), each intervention is designed to release somatic tension, restore nervous system balance, and foster a profound connection with your own body.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem9Description: Our psycho-nutrition team designs therapeutic meal plans to restore physical and mental homeostasis. Beyond diet, we accompany you in implementing fundamental lifestyle adjustments—from sleep architecture to chronic stress management—optimizing every factor that influences your vitality.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem10Description: The mind-body connection is at the core of our vision for longevity. Parallel to your mental health, our medical specialists diagnose and treat any physical ailments—whether cardiovascular, hormonal, dental, or dermatological. At Gabriel Arcángel, we treat the human being in their entirety, ensuring your physical health is as robust as your emotional well-being.
ConditionPage.howWeTreatItem11Description: In tandem with your mental health care, our medical infrastructure allows us to address any pre-existing or emerging physical conditions. Whether dealing with cardiovascular disorders, hormonal imbalances, chronic pain, or dermatological, dental, and sexual health issues, our team of specialists guarantees an accurate diagnosis and coordinated treatment under the highest clinical standards.
ConditionPage.ourTeamHeading: World-class specialists guiding every stage of your journey.

This select group of professionals offers constant support, administering your treatments with superior medical precision and unprecedented attention to detail throughout your time with us.

Depression.conditionHeading: Advanced Depression Treatment: Understanding its Origins and Manifestations
Depression.conditionDescription: Our approach to depression transcends superficial symptoms to identify the unique biochemical and psychological factors at the root of your condition. We design a strictly personalized therapeutic architecture, based on the premise that every life story requires an unrepeatable path to restoration.
Depression.whatIsDescription:
Depression is one of the most complex conditions in mental health; its nature is profound and its causes are almost invariably multifaceted. The origin of this disorder spans from biological and lifestyle factors—such as circadian rhythms and nutritional architecture—to underlying psychic dimensions, including deep-seated behavioral patterns, developmental trauma, and internal belief systems.
At our clinic, we have established a unique convergence of high-end medicine, depth psychology, and absolute personalization. We distinguish ourselves as a global leader in the simultaneous treatment of co-occurring conditions and every possible root cause of depression.
Our Functional Medicine protocol identifies biochemical imbalances and underlying organic dysfunctions that often serve as the invisible engine of depression. By integrating advanced technologies such as rTMS (repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation) and psychedelic-assisted therapies, alongside an intensive psychotherapy framework, we achieve a total intervention. This comprehensive approach allows us to dismantle the most complex layers of the disorder, facilitating a deep recovery in weeks, rather than years.
From a strictly clinical perspective, depression is a mood disorder that alters the neurobiology of thought, affect, and action. Major Depressive Disorder (MDD) manifests through a persistent state of melancholy and anhedonia—the inability to experience pleasure—lasting for more than two weeks, plunging the individual into a state of overwhelming apathy and exhaustion.
Depression has the highest comorbidity rate in the mental health field. There is a critical bidirectional relationship with substance abuse: both conditions often feed into each other in a cycle of self-dependence that intensifies suffering. At our center, we break this cycle by addressing both pathologies in parallel, ensuring that no underlying cause goes untreated.
Depression.signsTitle: What are the signs of depression?
Depression.signsDescription: Signs of depression manifest across a multidimensional spectrum, ranging from anhedonia (the loss of pleasure) and persistent sadness to biological alterations such as chronic fatigue, insomnia, and metabolic shifts.
Depression.symptom1Item1: Persistent sadness or a feeling of emptiness.
Depression.symptom1Item2: Loss of interest or pleasure in activities once enjoyed (anhedonia).
Depression.symptom1Item3: Fatigue or low energy, even with adequate sleep.
Depression.symptom1Item4: Difficulty concentrating, making decisions, or remembering things.
Depression.symptom1Item5: Feelings of hopelessness, worthlessness, or excessive guilt.
Depression.symptoms2Title: What are the psychological symptoms of depression?
Depression.symptom2Item1: Recurrent thoughts of death or suicide.
Depression.symptom2Item2: Irritability or frustration, even over small matters.
Depression.symptom2Item4: Difficulty in focusing or slowed thinking.
Depression.symptoms3Title: What are the physical symptoms of depression?
Depression.symptom3Item1: Changes in appetite, leading to significant weight loss or gain.
Depression.symptom3Item2: Sleep disturbances, such as insomnia or oversleeping.
Depression.symptom3Item3: Unexplained aches and pains, including headaches or stomach issues.
Depression.symptoms4Title: What are the behavioural symptoms of depression?
Depression.symptom4Item2: Reduced productivity or difficulty completing tasks.
Depression.symptom4Item4: Increased use of alcohol, drugs, or other substances.
Depression.symptom4Item5: Loss of interest in sex or decreased libido.
Depression.howWeTreatDescription:
We understand that depression can manifest as an overwhelming state of isolation. At Gabriel Arcángel, we transform that uncertainty into a structured, scientific healing process. While every diagnosis evolves uniquely, we guarantee that every stage of your four-week stay is designed with a rigor of absolute personalization. Here, generic protocols do not exist; no two patients follow the same path.
Each client is the center of a health ecosystem created specifically for their personal biography and neurobiology. Your bespoke treatment plan is meticulously structured day by day, integrating cutting-edge therapies that operate in perfect synergy. This multidimensional approach intervenes simultaneously across biological, emotional, and psychological axes, maximizing the possibilities of a deep and sustainable recovery.
We recognize that the journey toward health can be complex; therefore, our comprehensive approach equips you with the clinical tools and human accompaniment necessary to navigate it successfully. We are specialists in high-complexity cases, offering next-generation protocols for Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD).
Depression.section1Description:
At Gabriel Arcángel, we categorically reject standardized, ‘one-size-fits-all’ approaches. We understand that depression is not a generic condition, but a profoundly personal experience. For this reason, we design signature treatment programmes, strictly tailored to the unique biography and neurobiology of each client. While we integrate cutting-edge science, it is your individual narrative and the complexity of any co-occurring conditions that define the map of our intervention.
Our comprehensive approach represents a synergy between precision medicine and depth psychotherapy. Every protocol originates from an exhaustive, multidimensional diagnosis designed to unveil the root causes—biochemical, functional, and psychic—of your depression.
By placing your individuality at the epicenter of our practice, we guarantee a clinical strategy that does not merely mitigate symptoms but restores the integrity of your well-being. Our goal is not only immediate recovery, but the consolidation of a resilient and lasting mental health.
Depression.section2Description:
At Gabriel Arcángel, your healing process is supported by a world-class medical faculty, comprising physicians, psychotherapists, and functional medicine specialists. This interdisciplinary team provides comprehensive, around-the-clock accompaniment, ensuring that every facet of your well-being is addressed with the highest level of clinical rigor.
The cornerstone of our personalized care is the live-in therapist, a mental health professional available to you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. From the moment of admission to your departure, your live-in therapist provides a constant presence, offering guidance, emotional containment, and the security necessary to navigate the most challenging stages of depression.
To ensure excellence in your treatment, you will be assigned a lead psychiatrist who will personally oversee your medical and psychotherapeutic protocol. Their role is to ensure precise neurochemical balance and the effectiveness of every intervention.
Through an intensive psychotherapy framework—including high-depth individual sessions with your psychiatrist and senior specialists—we address both the psychic and biological dimensions of your condition. This approach does not merely treat symptoms; it equips you with the tools required to achieve a profound and lasting transformation on your journey toward full health.
Depression.section3Description:
At Gabriel Arcángel, your healing process is supported by a world-class medical faculty, comprising physicians, psychotherapists, and functional medicine specialists. This interdisciplinary team provides comprehensive, around-the-clock accompaniment, ensuring that every facet of your well-being is addressed with the highest level of clinical rigor.
The cornerstone of our personalized care is the live-in therapist, a mental health professional available to you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. From the moment of admission to your departure, your live-in therapist provides a constant presence, offering guidance, emotional containment, and the security necessary to navigate the most challenging stages of depression.
To ensure excellence in your treatment, you will be assigned a lead psychiatrist who will personally oversee your medical and psychotherapeutic protocol. Their role is to ensure precise neurochemical balance and the effectiveness of every intervention.
Through an intensive psychotherapy framework—including high-depth individual sessions with your psychiatrist and senior specialists—we address both the psychic and biological dimensions of your condition. This approach does not merely treat symptoms; it equips you with the tools required to achieve a profound and lasting transformation on your journey toward full health.

Trd.conditionDescription: We understand that TRD is an experience as exhausting as it is soul-crushing. After multiple failed attempts, skepticism is natural; however, at Gabriel Arcángel, we apply science where others see limits. Our protocols combine psychedelic-assisted psychotherapy and next-generation neurobiological interventions with disruptive clinical efficacy. Beyond the remission of symptoms, our commitment is to help you reclaim your sense of purpose and the vitality needed to reconnect with life.
Trd.whatIsDescription:
Depression is one of the most challenging conditions to endure, particularly when you feel you have exhausted every option without results. While treatment-resistant depression (TRD) is among the most complex pathologies to manage, recovery is achievable through a holistic therapeutic approach. The root causes are almost always multifaceted: ranging from ‘surface-level’ factors such as lifestyle, sleep hygiene, and diet, to deeply ingrained cognitive and behavioral patterns—often the result of childhood experiences and internal belief systems.
An individual is diagnosed with Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD) when they suffer from a depressive disorder that has not successfully responded to at least two antidepressant trials of adequate dosage and duration. Generally, those struggling with depression achieve recovery once they receive the appropriate medication and treatment; however, in cases of TRD, conventional pharmaceuticals offer no relief. This is a relatively common condition, affecting up to 30% of individuals battling clinical depression.
There is no single cause for TRD. In our experience at Gabriel Arcángel, depression becomes treatment-resistant when there are underlying factors—often trauma—that block the efficacy of antidepressants.
The good news is that TRD is, in fact, treatable. At Gabriel Arcángel, we believe that TRD simply means that antidepressants were not the right solution for you and that a different, more specialized therapeutic approach is required.
Trd.signsTitle: What are the signs of TRD?
Trd.signsDescription: An individual is diagnosed with Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD) when they suffer from a diagnosed depressive disorder that has not successfully responded to at least two antidepressant trials of adequate dose and duration.
Trd.symptoms1Title: Common symptoms of treatment-resistant depression (TRD) include:
Trd.symptom1Item1: Unchanged or worsened major depressive disorder (MDD) symptoms in response to antidepressants. These include: exhaustion that can feel like a constant hangover, rage, uncontrollable self-criticism and struggling to find peace or comfort.
Trd.symptom1Item2: Losing hope that you will feel better again, which drastically worsens MDD.
Trd.symptom1Item3: Feeling unsupported by your medical team, who may tell you your condition is untreatable.
Trd.howWeTreatDescription:
We understand that treatment-resistant depression demands a profoundly individualized approach; therefore, we do not adhere to pre-defined therapeutic routes. At Gabriel Arcángel, every client receives a signature treatment plan, meticulously designed according to their specific needs. Your four-week stay will be precisely structured to include a range of personalized therapies, such as rTMS (repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation), psychedelic-assisted psychotherapy, and a wide diversity of cutting-edge psychotherapeutic and medical interventions.
These therapies have been designed to act in synergy, addressing every dimension of your physical, emotional, and psychological well-being. See below for further details.
Trd.section1Description:
Despite its name, TRD is, in fact, treatable. At Gabriel Arcángel, we maintain that treatment-resistant depression simply means that conventional antidepressants have not been the solution for you. Instead, it requires a more intensive and immersive treatment program designed to delve into the root of the issue. Throughout your process, we will identify and address all underlying causes of your condition, not just the surface-level symptoms.
Our 360-degree approach is governed exclusively by your individual needs. Each treatment begins with exhaustive diagnostic testing that allows us to intervene at the origin of the pathology and restore your physical, psychological, and cellular health. By adopting a holistic vision, we prioritize multiple cutting-edge methods and health restoration practices before turning to pharmacology. These include state-of-the-art modalities such as bio-resonance treatment, gut microbiome restoration, sleep therapies, intensive psychotherapy, and biochemical restoration, among many others.
Trd.section2Description:
At Gabriel Arcángel, we integrate cutting-edge interventions such as ketamine-assisted psychotherapy. This protocol has demonstrated exceptional efficacy not only in chronic pain management but as a disruptive tool against Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD).
While it is not a definitive ‘cure’ its capacity to induce profound remission in even the most persistent cases positions it as one of the most significant breakthroughs in modern psychiatry. Although the WHO warns that 30% of depressive cases evolve into TRD, our methodology is transforming this landscape, restoring hope and functionality where other treatments have failed.
Trd.section3Description:
We curate our comprehensive TRD treatment programs to align strictly with your individual needs. Should you require the ability to maintain your professional commitments during your stay, we will ensure it is made possible. At every stage, you can expect cutting-edge therapies delivered with medical excellence.
We provide specialized treatment for Treatment-Resistant Depression (TRD) and any co-occurring mental health conditions at our discreet center in Querétaro, where your privacy remains our utmost priority.

Anxiety.conditionHeading: Understanding Anxiety: From a Natural Reaction to a Clinical Disorder
Anxiety.conditionDescription: At Gabriel Arcángel, we have demonstrated that by precisely addressing the physical, cognitive, and emotional root causes of anxiety, it is possible to achieve a symptom-free life within a matter of weeks.
Anxiety.whatIsDescription:
Anxiety is, originally, a healthy biological response designed for survival. However, a disorder arises when this reaction crystallizes into a permanent state of being. Persistent doubt and intrusive thoughts generate a distortion of reality that can lead the patient to feel a total loss of control. This emotional intensity translates into systemic wear and tear: mental rumination, chronic exhaustion, low self-esteem, and exhaustive hypervigilance.
In the face of such anguish, it is common to develop substance dependencies as an avoidance mechanism; in fact, anxiety is a primary catalyst for substance abuse and comorbid conditions such as depression. While genetic factors and trauma exacerbate the condition, at Gabriel Arcángel, we have identified that the root is often an identity crisis: not ‘knowing’ who one truly is.
When we lose our internal compass, the outside world becomes threatening. If I do not trust the only thing I should know—my own self—paralyzing questions arise: Is this environment safe? Is this physical ailment lethal? Will I be okay? This existential uncertainty is the foundation upon which anxiety transforms into specific phobias, which act as ‘containers’ for a fear that previously had no name.
Lifestyle factors—such as nutrition, sleep hygiene, and habits—act as modulators of these symptoms. For this reason, our intervention at Gabriel Arcángel transcends superficial relief. Through precision medicine and integral restoration, we help our clients resolve the fundamental question that deactivates the disorder: ‘Who am I?’
Anxiety.signsTitle: What are the signs of anxiety?
Anxiety.signsDescription: Anxiety can manifest in a multitude of ways, making any list of ‘signs and symptoms’ virtually endless.
Anxiety.symptom1Item1: Rumiación Ansiosa Global: Preocupación persistente y desproporcionada sobre múltiples esferas de la vida, difícil de mitigar mediante el razonamiento lógico.
Anxiety.symptom1Item2: Tensión Psicomotora Permanente: Estado subjetivo de inquietud motora o sensación de estar ‘al límite’ de la capacidad de resistencia emocional.
Anxiety.symptom1Item3: Astenia Neurobiológica: Fatiga profunda o agotamiento prematuro, donde el descanso convencional no logra restaurar los niveles de energía.
Anxiety.symptom1Item4: Disfunción Ejecutiva Transitoria: Deterioro de la capacidad de concentración o episodios de ‘bloqueo cognitivo’ (mente en blanco) causados por la saturación del sistema de alerta.
Anxiety.symptom1Item5: Labilidad e Irritabilidad Reactiva: Respuestas emocionales intensas o hipersensibilidad ante estímulos externos, producto de un umbral de tolerancia reducido.
Anxiety.symptoms2Title: What are the psychological symptoms of depression?
Anxiety.symptom2Item1: Existential Anguish and Dread: Persistent feelings of apprehension or a sense of impending doom without an apparent cause.
Anxiety.symptom2Item2: Cognitive Intrusion: Involuntary thoughts or ruminative fears that present intrusively and remain refractory to voluntary control.
Anxiety.symptom2Item3: Circadian Cycle Disruption: Sleep-onset or maintenance insomnia triggered by tachypsychia (racing thoughts) and the inability to achieve mental disconnection.
Anxiety.symptom2Item4: Neurosensory Hypervigilance: An exacerbated state of alertness toward perceived threats, keeping the nervous system in a constant cycle of stress.
Anxiety.symptom2Item5: Crises of Discontrol: Paralyzing fear of losing autonomy, syncope (fainting), or depersonalization (the sensation of ‘losing one's mind’).
Anxiety.symptoms3Title: What are the physical symptoms of depression?
Anxiety.symptom3Item1: Cardiovascular Alterations: Tachycardia, persistent palpitations, or functional arrhythmias.
Anxiety.symptom3Item2: Autonomic Dysregulation: Episodes of profuse sweating, hot flashes, fine tremors, or involuntary muscle twitches.
Anxiety.symptom3Item3: Paresthesia: Sensations of numbness, tingling, or ‘pins and needles’ in the extremities.
Anxiety.symptom3Item4: Gastrointestinal Somatization: Digestive disturbances, nausea, or a sensation of abdominal pressure.
Anxiety.symptom3Item5: Respiratory Compromise: Dyspnea (shortness of breath), hyperventilation, or a feeling of imminent suffocation.
Anxiety.symptom3Item6: Musculoskeletal Tension: Persistent rigidity, myalgia (muscle pain), or tension-type headaches.
Anxiety.symptom3Item7: Hypochondriacal Ideation: Perception of somatic symptoms linked to lethal pathologies without a diagnosable organic basis.
Anxiety.symptoms4Title: What are the behavioural symptoms of depression?
Anxiety.symptom4Item1: Behavioral Avoidance: Elusion of situations, people, or places that act as anxiety triggers.
Anxiety.symptom4Item2: Paralysis Procrastination: Persistent difficulty initiating tasks due to cognitive overload or fear of failure.
Anxiety.symptom4Item3: Compulsive Behaviors: Repetitive actions, such as constant checking or the incessant search for external reassurance.
Anxiety.symptom4Item4: Social Withdrawal or Isolation: A tendency toward interpersonal disconnection as a protective mechanism against overstimulation.
Anxiety.symptom4Item5: Palliative Self-Medication: The use of substances, alcohol, or food as tools for escape or emotional regulation.
Anxiety.symptom4Item6: Over-preparation or Adaptive Perfectionism: Excessive effort to control every detail in order to mitigate perceived risks.
Anxiety.howWeTreatDescription:
At Gabriel Arcángel, generic protocols do not exist. Because every neurobiology is unique, your four-week stay does not follow a predefined path, but rather a dynamic therapeutic architecture. Each patient receives a bespoke master plan, where every day is meticulously structured with interventions tailored to their specific biochemical and emotional profile.
Our therapies operate in synergy, ensuring a comprehensive restoration that encompasses physical health, psychological resilience, and emotional balance. Below, we detail the pillars of our intervention.
Anxiety.section1Description: Our comprehensive restoration model converges on three fundamental axes: precision medicine, high-intensity psychotherapy, and the optimization of the mind-body synergy. Each protocol is underpinned by advanced diagnostic mapping, designed to identify and rectify underlying biochemical and functional imbalances. Your unique biological architecture is the sole axis guiding our clinical praxis.
Anxiety.section2Description:
At Gabriel Arcángel, your healing process is supported by a world-class medical faculty, comprising physicians, psychotherapists, and functional medicine specialists. This interdisciplinary team provides comprehensive, around-the-clock accompaniment, ensuring that every facet of your well-being is addressed with the highest level of clinical rigor.
The cornerstone of our personalized care is the live-in therapist, a mental health professional available to you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. From the moment of admission to your departure, your live-in therapist provides a constant presence, offering guidance, emotional containment, and the security necessary to navigate the most challenging stages of depression.
To ensure excellence in your treatment, you will be assigned a lead psychiatrist who will personally oversee your medical and psychotherapeutic protocol. Their role is to ensure precise neurochemical balance and the effectiveness of every intervention.
Through an intensive psychotherapy framework—including high-depth individual sessions with your psychiatrist and senior specialists—we address both the psychic and biological dimensions of your condition. This approach does not merely treat symptoms; it equips you with the tools required to achieve a profound and lasting transformation on your journey toward full health.
Anxiety.section3Description:
Our anxiety protocols transcend mere symptomatic relief: they explore identity and purpose, facilitating a profound redefinition of your personal and social projection. Guided by this premise, and through the convergence of cutting-edge therapeutics and holistic care, we achieve significant recovery within a matter of weeks.
At our Querétaro facility, we address anxiety and dual pathologies with a standard of absolute excellence. When the clinical presentation requires it, we integrate precision pharmacology designed to stabilize symptomatology and accelerate the process of biopsychosocial restoration.

BipolarDisorder.conditionDescription: Aunque el trastorno bipolar representa un desafío neurobiológico complejo, es posible neutralizar su impacto desadaptativo mediante una intervención de precisión. Nuestros protocolos integrales están diseñados para que usted recupere el gobierno sobre su afectividad, restaurando la homeostasis sistémica y garantizando una estabilidad funcional a largo plazo.
BipolarDisorder.whatIsDescription:
In daily life, mood fluctuations are common; however, within the spectrum of bipolar disorder, these variations transform into oscillations of disruptive and unpredictable intensity. This affective pathology is not merely emotional instability, but a neurobiological dysregulation that alternates between the expansion of mania (or hypomania) and the depth of depression, severely compromising the architecture of thought and behavior.
The term ‘bipolar’ describes the tension between two antagonistic neurophysiological states. The manic phase is characterized by a state of motor and cognitive hyperactivity. The patient may experience tachypsychia (racing thoughts), a drastic reduction in the need for sleep, and a sense of invincibility leading to impulsive risk-taking. Conversely, the depressive phase represents the polar opposite, marked by profound asthenia, persistent hopelessness, and an emotional void that paralyzes decision-making and concentration. It also manifests in mixed states; in this highly complex presentation, the energy of mania collides with the sadness of depression, creating a state of internal agitation with high clinical risk.
The etiology of bipolar disorder is not singular; it is the convergence of genetic, neurochemical, and environmental factors. Current science underscores the critical role of imbalances in neurotransmitters such as dopamine, serotonin, and norepinephrine, which—interacting with chronic stress or underlying trauma—disrupt emotional homeostasis.
Bipolar disorder rarely occurs in isolation. Dual pathologies such as anxiety, ADHD, or substance use disorders often coexist. At Gabriel Arcángel, we position ourselves as the global benchmark in precision medicine for bipolar disorder. We do not merely treat symptoms: we perform comprehensive mapping of every root cause and concurrent condition to restore sovereignty over your life.
BipolarDisorder.signsTitle: What are the signs of bipolar disorder?
BipolarDisorder.signsDescription: There are three primary types of bipolar disorder: bipolar I disorder, bipolar II disorder, and cyclothymia. While similarities exist between them, the specificities of the symptoms differ regarding the nature and duration of the manic episodes experienced.
BipolarDisorder.symptom1Item1: Defined by at least one full manic episode, which may be followed by depressive episodes.
BipolarDisorder.symptom1Item2: Mania can last a week or more and may require hospitalisation.
BipolarDisorder.symptom1Item3: Depressive episodes are common but not required for diagnosis.
BipolarDisorder.symptom2Item1: Defined by at least one hypomanic episode (less intense than full mania) and one major depressive episode.
